seo.title: Trust Painting Inc. | Expert Painters in Dallas, TX | Free Estimates
seo.description: Trust Painting Inc. offers premium interior and exterior painting services in Dallas, TX. Professional, reliable, and affordable. Get your free estimate today!

hero.headline: Transform Your Home or Business with Expert Painting
hero.subheadline: From interior rooms to exterior facades, we deliver flawless finishes that last. Trusted by homeowners and businesses across Dallas.

featureSections.title: Breathe New Life Into Your Living Spaces
featureSections.body: Our interior painting services transform your home or office with precision and care. We use premium paints and techniques to ensure a smooth, durable finish that enhances your environment.
featureSections.cardBody: From bedrooms to basements, we handle every room with the same attention to detail.

featureSections.title: Boost Curb Appeal & Protect Your Property
featureSections.body: Our exterior painting services not only beautify your property but also protect it from the Texas elements. We use weather-resistant paints and thorough prep work for lasting results.
featureSections.cardBody: Enhance your home's curb appeal and value with our professional exterior painting.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Fully licensed and insured for your peace of mind. We meet all Dallas regulations.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We use only top-tier paints and supplies for a finish that stands the test of time.

whyChooseUs.title: Detailed Preparation
whyChooseUs.description: Every job starts with thorough prep—cleaning, sanding, and priming—for flawless results.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful
whyChooseUs.description: We treat your property with respect, leaving every space spotless after completion.

cta.headline: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation estimate.

servicesPage.intro: At Trust Painting Inc., we offer a full range of painting services for residential and commercial properties in Dallas. Our experienced team delivers exceptional quality, from initial consultation to final cleanup.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.shortDescription: Transform your indoor spaces with our expert interior painting services.
services.longDescription: Our interior painting service covers everything from single rooms to entire homes. We use premium paints and meticulous techniques to ensure a smooth, even finish. Our team handles all preparation, including patching holes, sanding, and priming, so you get a long-lasting result.
benefits: Protects walls from wear and tear
Low-VOC options for safer air quality

process.title: Consultation & Color Selection
process.description: We discuss your vision, measure the space, and help you choose the perfect colors and finishes.

process.title: Preparation & Protection
process.description: We move furniture, cover floors, and prep surfaces by cleaning, sanding, and priming.

process.title: Painting & Cleanup
process.description: Our painters apply coats with precision, then thoroughly clean up, leaving your space spotless.

faqs.question: How long does interior painting take?
faqs.answer: A typical room can be completed in one to two days, depending on size and condition. We'll give you a timeline during the estimate.

faqs.question: Do you provide paint colors?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer color consultation and can match any brand or shade you prefer.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your property's exterior with durable, weather-resistant paint.
services.longDescription: Our exterior painting service is designed to withstand Dallas's climate. We power wash, scrape, and prime surfaces before applying premium exterior paints. Whether it's wood, stucco, or brick, we ensure a finish that lasts for years.
benefits: Boosts curb appeal and home value
Enhances energy efficiency with reflective coatings

process.title: Inspection & Surface Prep
process.description: We inspect the exterior, power wash, and repair any damaged areas.

process.title: Caulking & Priming
process.description: We seal gaps and apply primer to ensure adhesion and durability.

process.title: Painting & Final Inspection
process.description: We apply two coats of premium paint and do a thorough walkthrough with you.

faqs.question: How often should I paint my home's exterior?
faqs.answer: Typically every 5-10 years, depending on material and weather exposure. We can assess your home's needs.

faqs.question: Do you paint in winter?
faqs.answer: Yes, as long as temperatures are above 35°F. We schedule around weather to ensure optimal drying.

services.title: Commercial Painting
services.shortDescription: Professional painting for offices, retail, and industrial spaces with minimal disruption.
services.longDescription: Our commercial painting services are tailored for businesses. We work around your schedule—nights, weekends, or off-hours—to minimize downtime. From small offices to large warehouses, we deliver consistent, high-quality results.

process.title: Project Assessment & Quoting
process.description: We evaluate the space, discuss your needs, and provide a detailed quote and timeline.

process.title: Scheduling & Preparation
process.description: We coordinate with you to schedule work during off-hours and prep the area.

process.title: Execution & Cleanup
process.description: Our crew paints efficiently and cleans up thoroughly, ensuring a ready-to-use space.

faqs.question: Can you work after hours?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer flexible scheduling including nights and weekends to avoid disrupting your business.

faqs.question: Do you use low-odor paints?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer low-VOC and low-odor options to maintain a comfortable environment.

services.title: Cabinet & Furniture Painting
services.shortDescription: Give your cabinets and furniture a fresh, modern look with our specialty painting.
services.longDescription: Revitalize your kitchen, bathroom, or office with our cabinet and furniture painting service. We use high-quality paints and techniques to achieve a smooth, factory-like finish. It's a cost-effective alternative to replacement.

process.title: Removal & Cleaning
process.description: We remove doors and hardware, then thoroughly clean and degrease all surfaces.

process.title: Sanding & Priming
process.description: We sand and apply a bonding primer to ensure the paint adheres properly.

process.title: Spraying & Reassembly
process.description: We spray multiple thin coats for a smooth finish, then reinstall hardware and doors.

faqs.question: How long does cabinet painting take?
faqs.answer: Typically 3-5 days, including drying time. We'll provide a precise timeline.

faqs.question: Can you match existing colors?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can color-match to any sample or swatch you provide.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Painting Experts Since 2008
about.mission: Our mission is to deliver exceptional painting services that exceed expectations, using premium materials and skilled craftsmanship, while maintaining integrity and respect for every client's home or business.
story: Trust Painting Inc. was founded in 2008 by a team of experienced painters who saw a need for reliable, high-quality painting services in Dallas. Starting with small residential projects, we built a reputation for meticulous attention to detail and outstanding customer service. Over the years, we've expanded to include commercial and specialty painting, serving clients across the Dallas metroplex.

Today, we are a family-owned business that treats every project as if it were our own home. Our team undergoes continuous training to stay updated on the latest techniques and products. We take pride in our work and are committed to making your painting experience stress-free and rewarding.

coreValues.title: Quality Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every brushstroke reflects our commitment to excellence.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our top priority. We listen, communicate, and deliver.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, transparent processes, and reliable service—always.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We are proud to serve Dallas and give back to the community that supports us.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate Today
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Contact us now for a free, no-obligation quote.
